description: Take feminine dressing to a new level with these Surf Twist sandals from clarks. The flamboyant leather flower gives it an added edge. Team it with dainty skirts and tops for a very girly look. Upper Leather thong uppers comprised of straps covering forefoot and midfoot for durability and comfort Leather lining for better comfort Leather cutout flower for added style Midsole Lushly cushioned footbed for absolute comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with engraved horizontal stripes on the forefoot and heel for better grip shoe care Use a branded leather polish to keep your shoes shining Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth or brush to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
